tools.name: routing.getRoutingVersionNumberCalculateReachableRangeOriginContentType
tools.description: Calculates a set of locations that can be reached from the origin point.

tools.name: routing.getRoutingVersionNumberCalculateRouteLocationsContentType
tools.description: Calculates a route between an origin and a destination.

tools.name: routing.postRoutingVersionNumberCalculateReachableRangeOriginContentType
tools.description: Calculates a set of locations that can be reached from the origin point. POST method handles additionally parameters: supportingPoints, allowVignette, avoidVignette, avoidAreas.

tools.name: routing.postRoutingVersionNumberCalculateRouteLocationsContentType
tools.description: Calculates a route between an origin and a destination. POST method handles additionally parameters: supportingPoints, allowVignette, avoidVignette, avoidAreas.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
